data.title: M&T Bank Corp declared $0.3515625/share quarterly dividend on preferred stock on Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: In Buffalo, New York on January 21, 2026, M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE: MTB) revealed its quarterly cash dividends for various series of perpetual preferred stock. The company declared a dividend of $0.3515625 per share on the Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative stock.

data.title: U-Haul Holding Company to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 4 after market close, conference call on Feb 5 at 8 am Arizona Time.
data.description: In Reno, Nevada, U-Haul Holding Company (NYSE: UHAL, UHAL.B) plans to release its third quarter fiscal 2026 financial results after market trading on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The company, which owns U-Haul International, Inc. along with Oxford Life Insurance Company, Repwest Insurance Company, and Amerco Real Estate Company, will host its third quarter investor conference call and webcast at 8 a.m. Arizona Time (10 a.m. ET) on Thursday, February 5, 2026.

data.title: Commerce Dept. issues preliminary countervailing duty findings on hardwood/ decorative plywood from China, Indonesia, Vietnam.
data.description: In the recent news dated January 21, 2026, the initial affirmative countervailing duty findings were disclosed by the U.S. Department of Commerce on January 16, 2026. These findings focus on the subsidies offered by China's government concerning hardwood and decorative plywood. The report highlighted substantial subsidies extended to these industries.

data.title: Oct 2025 Gross Profit Margin Index reveals rising efficiency despite pressure on margins for real estate firms.
data.description: Gross profit margins in the real estate industry are facing challenges, with recent figures indicating a complex financial landscape. Accounttech's latest industry study reveals a mix of numbers: while margins are under pressure, companies are showing increased efficiency. The data, released on January 21, 2026, suggests that companies are navigating a delicate balance as they strive to maintain profitability. This underscores the need for strategic decision-making and innovative approaches to address the evolving market dynamics.

data.title: Oceaneering to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 18/19 in Houston. (Maximum limit exceeded)
data.description: Houston-based company Oceaneering has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 18th. The corresponding conference call is scheduled for February 19th. This information was shared via a press release.

data.title: Franco-Nevada named one of Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations, first time for company.
data.description: In Toronto on January 21, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation, traded on TSX as FNV and NYSE as FNV, disclosed its recognition by Corporate Knights as one of the 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations. This marks the company's debut inclusion in the prestigious list.

data.title: Ethereum co-founder stresses importance of decentralized social media by 2026 to enhance online communication.
data.description: A prominent co-founder of Ethereum advocated for wider use of open social platforms, emphasizing that decentralized social media has the potential to enhance online communication by reintroducing competition.

Gavin Newsom, the governor of California, and possible US Presidential candidate in 2028, lauded the relationship between his state and China. Newsom was talking to CGTN on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Davos.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest reveals 13 Big Ideas for 2026, predicting significant impact on GDP and offering investment opportunities in its ETFs.
data.description: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, shared its "Big Ideas 2026" list featuring themes for the year, following a successful 2025 where its ETFs outperformed the S&P 500. The list includes 13 themes like AI Infrastructure, Bitcoin, Autonomous Vehicles, and Decentralized Finance among others. "The Great Acceleration" theme is key across multiple technologies, with capital investment potentially boosting GDP growth by 1.9 percentage points. Ark offers thematic ETFs like ARKK and ARKW covering these ideas, featuring revolutionary platforms such as robotaxis and AI agents. This could usher in a technological revolution affecting GDP growth significantly. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Maxus Mining investors exercise 2,408,200 warrants, raising $1,105,952 CDN in gross proceeds.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 21, 2026, Maxus Mining Inc. disclosed that investors have opted to exercise 2,408,200 common share purchase warrants of the Company, generating $1,105,952 in gross proceeds. The exercise of these warrants occurred between January 2, 2026, and January 16, 2026. Maxus, also known as the Company, operates with stock symbols CSE: MAXM and FRA: R7V.

data.title: High-grade lithium finds: 55.0m at 2.58% Li2O (29.9m at 4.11% Li2O) in Vega Zone; 24.7m at 4.00% Li2O (7.0m at 6.04% Li2O) CV13.
data.description: In Montreal on January 21, 2026, significant updates were shared regarding lithium drilling in Sydney, Australia as of January 22, 2026. The Vega Zone infill drilling showcased impressive results, with findings such as 55.0 meters at 2.58% Li2O, including 29.9 meters at 4.11% Li2O (CV25-1006), and 24.7 meters at 4.00% Li2O, including 7.0 meters at 6.04% Li2O (CV25-1017A). These discoveries indicate promising levels of lithium content and concentration in the region, with additional significant outcomes noted from the drilling process.

data.title: Gold Royalty Corp reported record quarterly and annual revenue, completing the Borborema Royalty Acquisition.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 21st, 2026, Gold Royalty Corp. (NYSE American: GROY) shared its initial findings for the last quarter of 2025, alongside information about its quarterly reports and upcoming earnings call. The Company is content to disclose these details, with specific figures to be found in the provided documents.

data.title: CNO Financial Group promotes Steve Janoson to SVP, Direct and Independent Distribution and Rachel Spehler to SVP, Deputy GC.
data.description: CNO Financial Group, Inc. has recently disclosed the promotion of Steve Janoson to the position of Senior Vice President for Direct and Independent Distribution, along with Rachel Spehler being promoted to Senior Vice President for Deputy General Counsel and Secretary. This announcement was made on January 21, 2026, through a press release. Notably, CNO Financial Group, Inc. operates under the stock symbol NYSE: CNO.

data.title: Robert Clifford named #1 lawyer in Illinois on 2026 Super Lawyers list.
data.description: Renowned attorney Robert A. Clifford, the founder and senior partner of Clifford Law Offices in Chicago, has recently been recognized as the top lawyer in Illinois for the year 2026 by Super Lawyers®. This honor places him at the pinnacle of the legal profession in the state. Clifford has consistently demonstrated exceptional legal acumen and leadership, earning him a spot on the prestigious "Top 10: 2026 Illinois Super Lawyers List." His outstanding achievements in the field have garnered him a series of awards and accolades, cementing his reputation as a formidable force in the legal community. The recognition by Super Lawyers reaffirms Clifford's position as a standout figure, with unparalleled expertise and a track record of success in the legal arena.

data.title: Aris Mining surpasses 2025 gold production guidance with 256,503 oz and projects 2026 production to reach 300,000–350,000 oz.
data.description: Aris Mining Corporation anticipates a production increase for 2026, with projections reaching 300,000 to 350,000 ounces. This growth is attributed to the Segovia ramp-up and Marmato expansion. The company recently reported a gold production of 256,503 ounces. Aris Mining trades on the TSX under the symbol ARIS and on the NYSE-A under ARMN.

data.title: KI Wall acquired Custom Glass Products, LLC-Wisconsin (CGP-WI) to improve precision and flexibility in glass fabrication.
data.description: KI Wall, a division of leading architectural wall systems and pod solutions provider KI, has completed the acquisition of Custom Glass Products, LLC - Wisconsin (CGP-WI), a glass fabricator based in Wausau, Wisconsin. This strategic partnership aims to enhance KI Wall's capabilities in storefront and glass-intensive wall system applications. The acquisition will bolster precision, flexibility, and reliability in their offerings. The move signifies a commitment to improving fabrication alignment and delivering superior service.

data.title: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 18, 2026, after market close. Conference call on Feb 19.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) announced that it will unveil its financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 18, 2026, post-market hours. As the top single-family home leasing and management firm in the U.S., Invitation Homes aims to hold a conference call the next day, February 19, 2026, starting at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. During the call, they will delve into the Q4 results, analyze recent developments, and engage in discussions.

data.title: December 2025 home sales up 14.9% from Nov, 5.0% higher than 2024. Median sales price softens.
data.description: In January 21, 2026, it was reported that home sales in December of 2025 saw a significant increase of 14.9% compared to November and were 5.0% higher than December of the previous year. This marks the sixth consecutive month in 2025 where sales have outperformed those of 2024. Additionally, the median sales price showed a decrease, indicating a softening market. These trends have resulted in a year that closely resembles the real estate market of 2024 across 52 regions.
